metadata.description: Official skills collection for fast-agent. Core tools for agent card development, deployment, and debugging.

skills.name: agent-card-hooks
skills.description: Guide for implementing fast-agent hooks (tool_hooks, lifecycle_hooks, trim_tool_history).

skills.name: compaction-strategies
skills.description: Hook-based history compaction: rolling window, threshold truncation, tool-result clearing, summary prompt.

skills.name: fast-agent-automation
skills.description: Automate fast-agent runs from CLI, Docker, and Hugging Face Jobs.

skills.name: hf-space-deployer
skills.description: Deploy fast-agent MCP Servers to Hugging Face Spaces using Docker.

skills.name: hf-static-space-deployer
skills.description: Deploy static websites/SPA to Hugging Face Spaces using sdk: static.

skills.name: lsp-setup
skills.description: Set up LSP tooling (ty/typescript-language-server) for fast-agent development.

skills.name: session-investigator
skills.description: Investigate fast-agent session/history files to diagnose issues, tool loops, timing.
